title: Patient Care Coordinator
description: Kaiser Permanente, a leading integrated healthcare organization, seeks a Patient Care Coordinator to support clinical operations at our Baltimore facility. You'll schedule appointments, manage patient communications, and coordinate care delivery. Work hybrid while contributing to Kaiser's mission of providing high-quality, affordable healthcare.
responsibilities: Schedule and manage patient appointments across departments
Respond to patient inquiries and coordinate care requests
Verify patient insurance and gather required documentation
Prepare clinical materials and maintain patient records
Communicate with clinical staff to coordinate care delivery
Follow up with patients on test results and treatment plans

requirements.education: High school diploma or GED; some college preferred
skills: Ability to multitask and manage priorities
Understanding of HIPAA and patient confidentiality

benefits: Paid time off and shift flexibility
Access to Kaiser Permanente healthcare services
